cpu: AMD A10-7800 Radeon R7, 12 Compute Cores 4C+8G
title: Left 4 Dead 2

notes: The game works native on Linux fine. I tried to run it on Proton, but it didn't work, got only a black screen.
title: Left 4 Dead 2

notes: Left 4 Dead 2 was automatically set to launch with Proton 4.11-7. It worked after a reboot, although the in-game overlay did not. I also experienced long load times and slight microstutters. The microstutters were improved on after I turned off multicore rendering and vsync. Besides that it ran just as well as on Windows.
title: Left 4 Dead 2
